title: Smoky Zesty American Celeriac Hash
description: A hearty, smoky American dish featuring tender celeriac, crispy lardons, and crumbled bacon.
instructions: Dice the celeriac and sauté in a pan with a little oil until tender.
In a separate pan, cook the lardons until crispy.
Add the onion and garlic to the pan with the lardons and cook until softened.
Add the paprika, brown sugar, and smoked paprika to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked celeriac to the pan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Roll out the lamination-puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place a spoonful of the celeriac mixture onto one half of each pastry square.
Fold the other half of the pastry square over the filling to form a square shape.
Press the edges of the pastry together to seal the filling inside.
Brush the tops of the pastry squares with a little bit of water.
Place the pastry squares on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese.
Return to oven for 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
